title: Sexual health screening documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports history, examination, ulcer site and number, lymph-node, systemic, pregnancy, HIV and clinician-selected syphilis, herpes or other evaluation context while stating that history and examination alone may be inaccurate.
examination.rationale: Supports entered lesion and clinician-selected STI evaluation context only.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports history, examination, ulcer site and number, lymph-node, systemic, pregnancy, HIV and clinician-selected syphilis, herpes or other evaluation context while stating that history and examination alone may be inaccurate.

source.title: Sexually Transmitted Infections Treatment Guidelines, 2021 — Genital Ulcers, Anogenital Warts, and Human Papillomavirus Infections

exact_section.heading: Diseases characterized by genital, anal, or perianal ulcers — diagnostic considerations

investigations.text: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.
investigations.rationale: Supports explicit HPV result and screening-context counselling without inferring infection timing or source.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.

source.title: Sexually Transmitted Infections Treatment Guidelines, 2021 — Genital Ulcers, Anogenital Warts, and Human Papillomavirus Infections

exact_section.locator: official HPV page prevention and counselling sections

source_limitations: Anatomy, exposure, symptoms, consent, pregnancy, vaccination and prior results are absent.
No STI risk, test panel, diagnosis, partner action or reporting conclusion is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
